6: Equation Paper (דף נוסחאות) - Specification
7: 
8: 1. Context & Goal
9: 
10: Provide students with immediate access to relevant mathematical formulas during their interaction with the AI teacher. This mimics a real exam environment and reduces cognitive load by preventing students from needing to leave the chat to look up standard equations.
11: 
12: Design Source (Figma): 
13: https://www.figma.com/make/W4z9xqikrrgXPs7qooxsst/Math-Formulas-Reference?p=f&t=ZGjyLQu6QfZCECIN-0
14: 
15: 2. Behavior & Policy (Product Contract)
16: 
17: 2.1 Visibility & Access
18: 
19: Target Audience: The button and sheet are visible to all users (public or authenticated) who are viewing a published lesson.
20: 
21: Empty State: If neither the lesson nor the course has an attached formula sheet, the "דף נוסחאות" button must be hidden.
22: 
23: Localization: Formula sheets are localized per locale.
24: 
25: Fallback Rule: If a sheet is missing in the user's current locale (e.g., he), attempt to render the en version. If both are missing, hide the button.
26: 
27: 2.2 Content Precedence
28: 
29: The system follow a strict fallback hierarchy:
30: 
31: Lesson Override: If a Lesson has a specific sheet attached, display it.
32: 
33: Course Default: If the Lesson has no sheet, use the parent Course default.
34: 
35: None: Hide the UI.
36: 
37: 2.3 Interaction Rules
38: 
39: Persistence: Opening or closing the viewer must not interrupt the chat session, clear input text, or reset scroll positions.
40: 
41: Responsive Display: On mobile, the sheet opens as a full-screen drawer. On desktop, it renders as a side panel or modal (per Figma).
42: 
43: 3. Product Constraints
44: 
45: 3.1 Content Formats
46: 
47: Lexical richText: Must be rendered via the existing MathMarkdown component to support LaTeX formulas.
48: 
49: PDF: Max file size 5MB. Must be responsive and allow zoom/scroll on mobile viewports.
50: 
51: 3.2 Admin & Governance
52: 
53: Shared Assets: Formula Sheets are shared entities. A single sheet (e.g., "Standard Trigonometry") can be linked to multiple courses or lessons.
54: 
55: Global Updates: Editing a shared sheet updates its content everywhere it is linked immediately.
56: 
57: Naming Convention: Admins must name sheets using the pattern: [Course Code] - [Topic] - [Version] (e.g., 471 - Calc - v1).
58: 
59: 4. Operational Requirements (Seeding)
60: 
61: Course 471: The specific equation paper content from the Figma design must be backfilled to course "כיתה יא - 4 יח"ל - 471".
62: 
63: Method: This is a one-time idempotent migration script.
64: 
65: 5. Non-Goals (v1)
66: 
67: No search functionality inside the formula sheet.
68: 
69: No per-question "suggested formulas" (formula sheet is static).
70: 
71: No instrumentation/analytics for formula usage in version 1.
72: 
73: 6. Acceptance Criteria
74: 
75: [ ] Button styling matches Figma (Telescope theme).
76: 
77: [ ] "דף נוסחאות" button is hidden if no sheet is linked.
78: 
79: [ ] Lesson-level override correctly replaces Course-level default.
80: 
81: [ ] LaTeX equations render clearly in RichText mode.
82: 
83: [ ] Closing the viewer preserves the active chat input and scroll state.
84: 
85: 7. Edge Case Handling
86: 
87: Missing PDF File: If a sheet is type PDF but the file is missing, display: "Formula sheet could not be loaded."
88: 
89: Empty Content: If a RichText sheet is linked but has no content, hide the button.
90: 
91: Slow Load: Provide a loading skeleton while content is fetching.
92: 
93: Technical Spec Link
94: 
95: Internal Note: Technical details (schema, file paths, component props) are maintained in the Technical implementation plan.
96: 
97: ---
98: _Created by @korenguy123 via Cody dashboard_

Equation Paper (דף נוסחאות) - Specification

1. Context & Goal

Provide students with immediate access to relevant mathematical formulas during their interaction with the AI teacher. This mimics a real exam environment and reduces cognitive load by preventing students from needing to leave the chat to look up standard equations.

Design Source (Figma): 
https://www.figma.com/make/W4z9xqikrrgXPs7qooxsst/Math-Formulas-Reference?p=f&t=ZGjyLQu6QfZCECIN-0

2. Behavior & Policy (Product Contract)

2.1 Visibility & Access

Target Audience: The button and sheet are visible to all users (public or authenticated) who are viewing a published lesson.

cat << 'SPECEOF' > /Users/bot/actions-work/A-Guy/A-Guy/.tasks/260308-auto-478/spec.md
# Equation Paper (דף נוסחאות) - Specification

## Overview

Provide students with immediate access to relevant mathematical formulas during their interaction with the AI teacher. This mimics a real exam environment and reduces cognitive load by preventing students from needing to leave the chat to look up standard equations.

## Requirements

### 2.1 Visibility & Access

- **Target Audience**: The button and sheet are visible to all users (public or authenticated) who are viewing a published lesson.
- **Empty State**: If neither the lesson nor the course has an attached formula sheet, the "דף נוסחאות" button must be hidden.
- **Localization**: Formula sheets are localized per locale.
- **Fallback Rule**: If a sheet is missing in the user's current locale (e.g., he), attempt to render the en version. If both are missing, hide the button.

### 2.2 Content Precedence

The system follow a strict fallback hierarchy:

- **Lesson Override**: If a Lesson has a specific sheet attached, display it.
- **Course Default**: If the Lesson has no sheet, use the parent Course default.
- **None**: Hide the UI.

### 2.3 Interaction Rules

- **Persistence**: Opening or closing the viewer must not interrupt the chat session, clear input text, or reset scroll positions.
- **Responsive Display**: On mobile, the sheet opens as a full-screen drawer. On desktop, it renders as a side panel or modal (per Figma).

### 3.1 Content Formats

- **Lexical richText**: Must be rendered via the existing MathMarkdown component to support LaTeX formulas.
- **PDF**: Max file size 5MB. Must be responsive and allow zoom/scroll on mobile viewports.

### 3.2 Admin & Governance

- **Shared Assets**: Formula Sheets are shared entities. A single sheet (e.g., "Standard Trigonometry") can be linked to multiple courses or lessons.
- **Global Updates**: Editing a shared sheet updates its content everywhere it is linked immediately.
- **Naming Convention**: Admins must name sheets using the pattern: [Course Code] - [Topic] - [Version] (e.g., 471 - Calc - v1).

### 4. Operational Requirements (Seeding)

- **Course 471**: The specific equation paper content from the Figma design must be backfilled to course "כיתה יא - 4 יח"ל - 471".
- **Method**: This is a one-time idempotent migration script.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Button styling matches Figma (Telescope theme).
- [ ] "דף נוסחאות" button is hidden if no sheet is linked.
- [ ] Lesson-level override correctly replaces Course-level default.
- [ ] LaTeX equations render clearly in RichText mode.
- [ ] Closing the viewer preserves the active chat input and scroll state.

## Edge Case Handling

- **Missing PDF File**: If a sheet is type PDF but the file is missing, display: "Formula sheet could not be loaded."
- **Empty Content**: If a RichText sheet is linked but has no content, hide the button.
- **Slow Load**: Provide a loading skeleton while content is fetching.

## Non-Goals (v1)

- No search functionality inside the formula sheet.
- No per-question "suggested formulas" (formula sheet is static).
- No instrumentation/analytics for formula usage in version 1.
SPECEOF
